action.reasoning: Observation: Iterations 10-18 all failed training DINOv2 due to truncated train scripts; best accuracy 0.2157 from CLIP 5-epoch still stands. 2.21h budget, 11 iterations remain. Analysis: Test-time augmentation (TTA) on the existing strong CLIP checkpoint can boost accuracy without additional training and avoids the truncation problem entirely. Decision: implement multi-crop (10-crop) TTA in predict.py, load best_model_clip.pt, submit eval immediately. Expected improvement of 1-2% in Quickdraw accuracy, comparable to an ensemble without complex training.
